act: Machakos County Physical and Land Use Planning
requirement: Zoning compliance check for industrial projects in Mavoko/Mlolongo corridor.
remedy: Obtain Machakos County Development Permit from Mavoko Sub-County office.

requirement: Noise and vibration limits for construction in residential high-density zones.
remedy: Restrict construction hours to 0800h-1700h and monitor decibel levels at site boundary.

requirement: Lake Basin protection: Mandatory silt traps for Lake Victoria shoreline development.
remedy: Install 3-stage filtration/siltation network before any shoreline ground disturbance.

requirement: Setback requirements for 60m from the high-water mark.
remedy: Adjust project footprint to maintain 60m mandatory setback from Indian Ocean mean high water mark.
